title: WindBreaker
description: Extreme light weight Sodium base high performance modpack template
body:
![WindBreaker Baanner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Er2bMzL7/images/799c4adcef8736b9996769a5a2e85cfd0d6d4446.png) ![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/Er2bMzL7?label=Downloads&logo=modrinth&style=flat-square) [![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/607123183249653770?label=Discord&logo=discord&style=flat-square)](https://discord.gg/Yj9WH3P8RN)

About Modpack

  • High Performance
    Increase single and multiplayer performance by using Sodium mods and other optimization mods
  • Modpack Template
    Free to use this modpack as a template to increase performance

Recommended JVM Arguments

    Java >= 23

    -Xms4G -Xmx4G -XX:+UseZGC

    Java 21

    -Xms4G -Xmx4G -XX:+UseZGC -XX:+ZGenerational
